result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '1 year') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each owner change counts as a transfer from old_owner to new_owner; attribute count to old_owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  -- agents who handled >0 cases in the period: appear as old or new owner in owner assignments
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '1 year') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each owner change counts as a transfer from old_owner to new_owner; attribute count to old_owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  -- agents who handled >0 cases in the period: appear as old or new owner in owner assignments
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS asof,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 year') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ch.field__c, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 year')
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
GROUP BY ch.field__c
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ch.field__c, COUNT(*) AS n

WHERE ch.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 year')
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
GROUP BY ch.field__c
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS asof,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 year') AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
